title: astragalus rosae
intro: Astragalus rosae, also known as Huang Qi in traditional Chinese medicine, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and fatigue, enhancing immune function, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus rosae is often used in herbal preparations, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
